sourceMovie.title: The Last Viking
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: People revisit The Last Viking for the same reason it broke through in 2025: clear stakes, memorable faces, and a crime rhythm that doesn't stall in the middle. Anders Thomas Jensen keeps the ensemble pointed in one direction. The comedy and crime blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Chicago
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If The Last Viking clicked for you, Chicago (2002) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and crime, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after The Last Viking?
faq.answer: Try Chicago, Bottle Rocket, American Psycho—each shares DNA with The Last Viking while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is The Last Viking?
faq.answer: The Last Viking (2025) is best described as Comedy, Crime, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is The Last Viking worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
